title: I've watched all of Stuart Fails to Save the Universe and it's a smarter spinoff than we've given it credit for — ride through the rough first episode to reach sitcom glory
summary: There's enough ties to Big Bang Theory to satisfy all... just ride out the rough first episode. But there's good news — new HBO Max spinoff Stuart Fails to Save the Universe has made me feel like a born-again sitcom fan.
caption: output/2026-07-22/i-ve-watched-all-of-stuart-fails-to-save-the-universe-and-it-s-a-smart.txt
